user.title: IVT AirX Heat Pump — Log in
user.description:
**Step 1:** Open this URL in a browser and log in with your SingleKey ID (Bosch/IVT account):

`{authorization_url}`

**Step 2:** After login, Chrome will stay on a `singlekey-id.com` page — that is normal. Press **Ctrl+U** (View Page Source), then press **Ctrl+F** and search for `code=`. Copy the long code value that appears after `code=` (stop at the `&`). Paste only that code value below.

*(Firefox users: the `com.bosch.tt.dashtt.pointt://...` URL appears in the address bar — copy the whole URL instead.)*

data.gateway_id: Gateway ID (optional — leave blank for auto-discovery)

error.invalid_code: No authorization code found. Check the page source (Ctrl+U on the singlekey-id.com page after login) and search for 'code=' — paste only the code value.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — the code may have expired (codes last ~60 seconds). Restart the flow and paste the code quickly.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Bosch PoinTT API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_gateway: Login succeeded but no heat pump gateway was found on this account.
error.no_refresh_token: The login did not return a refresh token. Please try again.
